gist.headline: Fresh off the presses
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just pinned the latest news to the repository's front page.
gist.summary: Automated GitHub Action update to the README's Latest News section.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository landing page up-to-date with recent project announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot acting as a paperboy or pinning a news bulletin to a board, with Polly the bee reading a tiny newspaper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a small news bulletin to a wooden board. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
